name: isu-contract-mgmt-v2
description: SAP Service Cloud V2 — ISU Contract Management

scripts.build:cf: npx cds build --production && npx cds deploy --to sqlite:gen/srv/db.sqlite --no-save
scripts.lsql: cds compile db/schema.cds --to sql && npx cds deploy --to sqlite:db.sqlite
scripts.rcf: rm -rf gen mta_archives && mbt build && cf deploy mta_archives/isu-contract-mgmt-v2_1.0.0.mtar
